programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: Gabby tries to infiltrate Golden Light, and Aunty Lee realises the extent of the danger there when she uncovers the mastermind behind the suspicious happenings there — an old nemesis from the past.

programme.title: The Catch
programme.desc: In this brand new, adventurous and mouth-watering series FOUR of Singapore's top chefs swap their high-society-city kitchens for Western Australia's rugged landscapes and stunning food producing regions teaming up with 4 West Australian chefs to actually catch the produce. Let the culinary culture clash commence!

programme.title: Raid The Cage: Season 02
programme.desc: Two teams of two compete to take prizes from the Cage before the time limit expires and the doors close. Correct answers adds seconds to the clock, allowing to claim more rewards from the Cage. The winning team keeps what they grabbed.

programme.title: Arts 21

programme.title: Johnny Test S5

programme.title: Cosmicrew S1
programme.desc: Meet the cosmic rangers - courageous team leader Storm the tiger, fun-loving man of action Flash the monkey and science genius Rainbow the rabbit! From the Cosmicrew Base - their headquarters on Earth - the cosmic rangers launch into mission after mission, helping animals across the globe using not only their high-tech Cosmicrew gear, but also their own strength, courage and smarts. Every exciting encounter helps Storm, Flash and Rainbow discover the amazing abilities each animal possesses.

programme.title: Ghostforce
programme.desc: Liv, Andy, and Mike are three teens who form the ultra-secret Ghostforce, a squad of superheroes with ghostly powers! With the help of the mysterious Glowboo and an arsenal of high-tech invented by their mentor, Miss Jones, our heroes battle and capture the ghosts that haunt New York City... before racing back to school for their next class!

programme.title: The Cube Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Andy Lee,, The Cube Australia sees competing pairs have nine lives to complete seven games, each worth an increasing amount of money, as they move closer to the huge jackpot. With key moments filmed using state-of-the-art bullet time' 3D time-freezing technology, it is more than a regular game show. It brings blockbuster visuals and Hollywood high tension direct to your living room. Will anyone have what it takes to beat the Cube?

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: Aunty Lee and the gang race to Golden Light to save Gabby before she meets the same tragic fate as Salim's mother, Rohaya. And Cherril makes a final decision about her marriage to Noel.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Border Interceptors
programme.desc: The series follows the work of the men and women who protect Ireland's borders on a daily basis. From dealing with the millions people who travel through Irish airports as they visit the Emerald Isle every year to making sure everything is above board with the millions of tonnes of goods that arrive and leave Irish shores every year.

programme.title: En Ulle
programme.desc: En Ulle is a powerful docu-drama series that takes an honest and empathetic look at mental health. Each episode focuses on real-life cases of individuals dealing with various mental health conditions, shedding light on the emotional, psychological, and physical impacts of these experiences. Through dramatization, personal testimonies, and expert analysis, En Ulle aims to educate, engage, and encourage open conversations around mental well-being.
